mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, t.status, t.created_at, t.updated_at, COUNT(ct.course_id) AS course_count FROM tag t LEFT JOIN course_tag ct ON t.id = ct.tag_id WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.id = #{id} GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.color, t.status, t.created_at, t.updated_at

WITH totals AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM course_tag) SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, COUNT(ct.course_id) AS course_count, totals.total AS total_associations, CASE WHEN totals.total > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(ct.course_id) * 100.0 / totals.total, 2) ELSE 0 END AS usage_rate FROM tag t LEFT JOIN course_tag ct ON t.id = ct.tag_id CROSS JOIN totals WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.color, totals.total ORDER BY course_count DESC, t.name ASC

SELECT t.id AS tag_id, t.name AS tag_name, t.color AS color, COUNT(ct.course_id) AS course_count FROM tag t LEFT JOIN course_tag ct ON t.id = ct.tag_id WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.color ORDER BY course_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
